headline: How The Verizon (VZ) Investment Story Is Shifting Without New Analyst Price Targets
summary: Verizon Communications enters this update cycle with no changes to its current analyst price targets, leaving the existing expectations in place for now. With no fresh analyst commentary alongside this, you are essentially working with the same formal guidance as before. In the sections that follow, you will see how to track new signals and context as the narrative around Verizon continues to evolve. headline: SpaceX will disrupt $1.6 trillion US communications industry, Oppenheimer says
summary: SpaceX will disrupt the $1.6 trillion U.S. communications industry as the Elon Musk-led company's ‌satellite broadband unit Starlink expands, Oppenheimer said in a ‌note on Wednesday, adding that legacy broadband providers like AT&T may be most ​at risk.  • Oppenheimer said companies such as AT&T, Verizon Communications and T-Mobile could see ⁠faster declines in subscribers and revenue going forward.  • Oppenheimer ​raised its 2030 estimates for ​U.S. broadband subscribers to ‌15 million from 10 million earlier.

headline: This Is What a $1 Million Dividend Portfolio Pays After Taxes
summary: At the 24% federal bracket, a $1 million dividend portfolio generating roughly $45,000 in annual income can hand the IRS between $6,750 and $10,800 every year, depending on how much of that income is qualified versus ordinary. Inside a Roth IRA, that same income lands in your account untouched. This article walks through exactly what ... This Is What a $1 Million Dividend Portfolio Pays After Taxes
